items.title: My thoughts on what the Celtics signing Mike Conley could mean for a potential Anfernee Simons reunion:
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
My thoughts on what the Celtics signing Mike Conley could mean for a potential Anfernee Simons reunion:

One can't ignore financial side of roster building, or that teams must plan with more than one year in mind. However, to me, this largely depends on Payton Pritchard's role next season.

Story ⬇️

items.title: Boston Celtics after signing Mitchell Robinson and Mike Conley.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Boston Celtics after signing Mitchell Robinson and Mike Conley.

They are just $5.1 million below the first apron hard cap.

They'd need to reduce payroll significantly if they'd like to use their $27.7 million trade exception.

items.title: With Mitchell Robinson & Mike Conley in the fold, the Celtics are at 15 players on standard deals (including Chris Cenac). I've got Boston at $3.5M over the tax and $5.1M under their first-apron hard cap (triggered by signing Robinson with the NTMLE).
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
With Mitchell Robinson & Mike Conley in the fold, the Celtics are at 15 players on standard deals (including Chris Cenac). I've got Boston at $3.5M over the tax and $5.1M under their first-apron hard cap (triggered by signing Robinson with the NTMLE).

Enough flexibility for other moves this summer.

items.title: I do look forward to a time in January and February when Conley is (inevitably) playing well and Simmons compares his career resurgence to John Travolta’s comeback. (I love Simmons btw).

items.title: Adding Conley doesn't change anything for any bigger plans for the Celtics. They can still use the full $15M Non-Taxpayer MLE or some (or all) of the $27.7M TPE.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Adding Conley doesn't change anything for any bigger plans for the Celtics. They can still use the full $15M Non-Taxpayer MLE or some (or all) of the $27.7M TPE.

I also wouldn't assume Conley being in the fold guarantees anyone else is getting traded. Good vet depth move.

items.title: The Celtics and Mike Conley have agreed to a one-year deal, per Shams.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
The Celtics and Mike Conley have agreed to a one-year deal, per Shams.

Boston adds another primary ball handler, bolstering their backcourt depth. This is also a great addition to the locker room.

items.title: Mike Conley is getting a one-year contract with Boston at the veteran minimum amount. Good guard depth for the Celtics behind Derrick White and Payton Pritchard. Boston was short on ballhandling at various points last season.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt: Mike Conley is getting a one-year contract with Boston at the veteran minimum amount. Good guard depth for the Celtics behind Derrick White and Payton Pritchard. Boston was short on ballhandling at various points last season.
